title: Axl Additions
description: Enhance your Minecraft experience with the Axl Additions Mod. Discover rare Ruby and versatile Copper, craft powerful weapons, and create unique structures. Expand your gameplay with Axl Additions Mod.
body:
Welcome to the Axl Additions Mod! This is the alpha version of an exciting mod that introduces a wide array of new features and content to enhance your Minecraft experience. Prepare yourself for an adventure filled with unique additions that will expand the possibilities of your gameplay.

🔷 Discover the rare and valuable Ruby Ore and Copper Ore as you explore your Minecraft world. Mine these ores to obtain Raw Ruby and Copper Ingots, which can be used to create powerful tools, weapons, and armor.

🔷 Harness the strength of the Ruby to forge a Ruby Sword and equip yourself with Ruby Armor, providing formidable defense and a striking appearance. Take on enemies with confidence as you wield these exceptional items.

🔷 Dive into the world of Copper, a versatile material that can be found underground. Smelt Copper Ore into Copper Ingots and use them to craft a variety of blocks, including Copper Blocks, Stairs, and Slabs, to give your builds a distinct touch.

🔷 Take advantage of the Copper Wrench, a specialized tool that allows you to rotate and adjust blocks effortlessly. Use it to fine-tune your creations and bring your architectural visions to life.

🔷 Stay tuned for future updates and additions to the Axl Additions Mod, as more exciting features and functionalities will be introduced. Explore new biomes, encounter unique mobs, and uncover hidden treasures as you continue your Minecraft journey.

Immerse yourself in a world of possibilities with the Axl Additions Mod. Embrace the new materials, tools, and adventures that await you in this alpha version. Your Minecraft experience will never be the same again!
